title: Budapest's first Pride since Orban left power
summary_full: Budapest held its first Pride march since the end of former prime minister Viktor Orban's 16-year government with thousands turning out to celebrate.
summary_public: Budapest held its first Pride march since the end of former prime minister Viktor Orban's 16-year government with thousands turning out to celebrate.

HU.label: positive
HU.evidence: Budapest's first Pride since Orban left power
